workLog: Read issue #1802 spec from GitHub (8.4 KB body).
Inspected fix-markdown-fences/ precedent and tests/skills/claude_skills_import.py helper.
Authored SKILL.md (frontmatter per .agents/steering/claude-skills.md, description under 200 chars).
Implemented inventory.py (parse, merge, render with deduplication by lowercased title key).
Implemented synthesis.py (build_gold_found with fixed High-Signal/Medium-Signal/Low-Signal section order, evaluation file resolution).
Implemented pan.py (init/validate/merge/synth subcommands, workspace resolution from --workspace > $PANNING_WORKSPACE > ./.panning).
Authored references/inventory-template.md and references/gold-found-template.md (no personal paths or OpenClaw markers).
Wrote test_pan.py (28 tests across parse, merge, render round-trip, synthesis, workspace resolution, CLI end-to-end).
Ran ruff -> 0 issues, mypy --strict -> 0 issues, pytest -> 28/28 passing.
nextSteps: Open PR with Fixes #1802 referencing acceptance criteria.
Enable auto-merge once required checks queue.
